title: Assertion failure when building timing model

features.name: procedural assignment with dynamic delay
features.description: Code should include a procedural assignment with a dynamic delay specification using a parameter as delay value

features.name: bufif1 gate with two delay values
features.description: Code should include a bufif1 gate instance with two delay specifications for rise and fall times

features.name: notif1 gate with delay
features.description: Code should include a notif1 (negative enable tri-state buffer) gate instance with delay specification

features.name: bufif1 gate with three delay values
features.description: Code should include a bufif1 gate instance with three delay specifications for rise, fall, and turn-off times
